news.t: KBW Announces Index Rebalancing for Fourth-Quarter 2025

holdings.infoBox: KBWP is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Aon plc stock at 8.25%, The Travelers Companies at 8.15%, Chubb at 7.95%, The Progressive Corporation at 7.85%, and Marsh & McLennan Companies at 7.46%.

overview.description: The Invesco KBW Property & Casualty Insurance ETF (KBWP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a modified market-cap-weighted index focused exclusively on property & casualty insurance companies in the US. KBWP was launched on Dec 2, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: KBW Nasdaq Property & Casualty Total Return Index
